name: astrojones-dev
description: The astrojones org plugin: nuklaut deploy knowledge, app scaffolding, repo-carried deploy tools, CI failure diagnosis, plus the harness's Claude Code surface — coding-workflow skills, subagents, safety-hook shims, and /harness-init. Bundles the repo-agent-harness MCP server (servers/harness-mcp/) — auto-connects at session start, no per-repo setup needed.
